global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a central content area showcasing various shapes and text.
global.main_message: Promoting a binge-watching service with new content available weekly.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area with a light red hue, featuring abstract shapes that suggest media content.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the center of the content area, slightly lighter than the background.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape positioned within the content area, contrasting with the circular shape.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small text label in the top left corner that reads 'UGC' in a simple, bold font.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom center with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Order now' in a clear font.

elements.label: Three dots
elements.description: Three small circular dots aligned horizontally, suggesting user engagement or options.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: A bold headline in the center of the content area that reads 'Binge starts now New hits every week' in a prominent font.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' is displayed prominently at the top, in a bold and modern font.

elements.label: Order now text
elements.description: A small text at the bottom center that reads 'Order now' in a clear, inviting font.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag in the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and modern, BingeLayer logo, engaging headline.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered in the content area, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
